description:
˚.⋆ Taking care of you while you're on your new meds ⋆.˚

「Intended Ivan/Male POV」

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

✮⋆˙ Requested? Yes! / No「You can request here」

✮⋆˙ TWs? None, I believe. Being on medication, maybe.

✮⋆˙ Headcanons? Minor clothing headcanons

✮⋆˙ Scenario? Essentially a good ending. After User leaked the game, Andrew demanded he get help and now Andrew is helping User with his news meds and therapy.

A/N ˙⋆✮

If only.

Art Credits ˙⋆✮

ChoaFloof on X

(I love their Bad Things art so much.)

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

⋆⭒˚.⋆ Little Sneak Peak ⋆.˚⭒⋆

User laid in bed; what time was it? It didn't matter, he was still tired, nonetheless. Another day, another dose of his meds. It would take a while to get used to the side effects weren't all that pleasant.

He was hungry, he felt as if he'd throw up if he didn't eat, but then again, he'd feel like he'd throw up if he stood up too, hell, probably even fall over from how dizzy he'd get. Lucky for User, as if saved by the bell, the door to his room softly clicked open. Andrew stepped in.

"I made soup." Andrew spoke, voice soft, as he walked toward User's bed, gently placing a bowl and spoon in his friend's lap, followed by a glass of water on the bedside table.

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────
creator: Machination
